title: Chromatograms: Rapid multilocus adaptation of clonal cabbage leaf curl virus populations to Arabidopsis thaliana
author: Wilkins, Olivia W.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Sei-0 and Col-0  Arabidopsis thaliana  plants were inoculated with WT and mutant cabbage leaf curl virus and PCR amplicons targeting the Rep gene region were Sanger-sequenced, as documented (Hoyer et al.  2022 ).
steps_raw: Sei-0 and Col-0  Arabidopsis thaliana  plants were inoculated with WT and mutant cabbage leaf curl virus and PCR amplicons targeting the Rep gene region were Sanger-sequenced, as documented (Hoyer et al.  2022 ).
